case_title: OPORTUN INC VS. SANDRA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ BARRERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $956.70 FILED BY OPORTUN INC AS TO DEFENDANT BARRERA, SANDRA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRERA, SANDRA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ $728.90 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $798.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA A. NDOUNDA--LEGAL ASSISTANT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BARRERA, SANDRA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-30-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARRERA, SANDRA ELIZABETH MARTINEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-07-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY NANCY ANGEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE; DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
